blended.narrative: Stowe is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 50°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
